conflicts.description: Chapter 1 counts Collins among the missing Hufflepuffs, but Chapter 6 places Collins physically in the Hufflepuff common room after the mass Cruciatus lesson.
conflicts.canonical_value: Collins is present at Hogwarts by chapter_06 and should not be treated as one of the missing Hufflepuffs.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 6 embeds Collins into multiple aftermath beats in the common room, while Chapter 1's missing-student list is easy to amend by replacing one surname or treating Miren's count as mistaken.
